Package i5.cb.workbench

Class CBIvaClient

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.cb.workbench.CBIvaClient

  • public class CBIvaClient
extends java.lang.Object
    Class: CBIvaClient for CBIva
    Function: Implements the Interface to CBClient
    See Also:
    CBIva, CBclient

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      CBIvaClient​(CBIva CBI)
      Constructor
      Function: Create a new Client from CBIva to a CBserver

      • tell

        public int tell​(java.lang.String sFrames)
        Function: Tells to CBserver
        Tells frames to the database and inserts messages into TelosEditor and LogWindow
        Parameters:
        sFrames - the frames
        Returns:
        the completion of the tell method
        See Also:
        CBclient.tell(java.lang.String)

      • untell

        public int untell​(java.lang.String sFrames)
        Function: Untell to CBserver
        Untells frames to the database and inserts messages into TelosEditor and LogWindow
        Parameters:
        sFrames - the frames
        Returns:
        the completion of the untell method

      • retell

        public int retell​(java.lang.String sUntellFrames,
                  java.lang.String sTellFrames)
        Function: Retell to CBserver
        Retells frames with the database and inserts messages into TelosEditor and LogWindow
        Parameters:
        sTellFrames - the frames to retell
        Returns:
        the completion of the untell method

      • ask

        public void ask​(java.lang.String sQuery,
                java.lang.String sQueryFormat,
                java.lang.String sAnswerRep,
                TelosEditor te)
        Function: Ask from CBserver
        Executes the query on the database and inserts messages into TelosEditor and LogWindow
        Parameters:
        sQuery - the query
        sQueryFormat - the format of the query (FRAMES or OBJNAMES)
        sAnswerRep - the format of the answer (e.g. FRAME, LABEL,...)
        te - The TelosEditor where to insert the answertext

      • ask

        public java.lang.String ask​(java.lang.String sQuery,
                            java.lang.String sQueryFormat,
                            java.lang.String sAnswerRep)
        Function: Ask from CBserver
        Executes the query on the database and inserts messages into TelosEditor and LogWindow
        Parameters:
        sQuery - the query
        sQueryFormat - the format of the query (FRAMES or OBJNAMES)
        sAnswerRep - the format of the answer (e.g. FRAME, LABEL,...)
        Returns:
        the result ("error" on error)

      • getObject

        public java.lang.String getObject​(java.lang.String sObjectName)
        Function: get an Object from CBserver
        Executes the query get_object on the database and inserts messages into TelosEditor and LogWindow
        Parameters:
        sObjectName - the object name
        Returns:
        the frame for the object

      • findInstances

        public java.lang.String findInstances​(java.lang.String sObjectName)
        Function: Find Instances on CBserver
        Executes the query find_instances on the database and inserts messages into TelosEditor and LogWindow
        Parameters:
        sObjectName - the object name
        Returns:
        the frame for the object

        java.lang.Throwable

      • tryStartLocalCBserverAndConnect

        public boolean tryStartLocalCBserverAndConnect​(java.lang.String newPort)
        Try to start a local CBserver and connect to it. This requires that the platform supports to start a local CBserver. It will only be attempted if CBIva's configuration does not include the feature to use a public CBserver.
        Parameters:
        newPort - portnumber to be used when starting the CBserver on localhost
        Returns:
        true if the CBserver startup and connection was successful

      • connectOrStartLocalCBserver

        public void connectOrStartLocalCBserver​()
        connect to a local (or public) CBserver. If not possible, then try to start a local CBserver and then connect to it.
